query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A person walking briskly along a wet paved surface, holding a bright red umbrella overhead. The figure wears a dark short-sleeved shirt and green knee-length shorts, with light-colored footwear. Behind them, autumn-colored foliage in yellow and green tones lines the edge of the path, with horizontal benches or ledges visible. Rain appears to be falling, creating a reflective sheen on the ground surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person walking briskly along a wet paved surface captured with heavy intentional motion blur that streaks the background foliage and ground into diagonal smears while leaving the figure semi-transparent and ghosted. The subject holds a bright red umbrella that bleeds color into its blurred edges, wearing a dark short-sleeved shirt and green knee-length shorts with light footwear. The lighting is flat and even without directional shadows, collapsing dimensional depth into a graphic, two-dimensional impression. Behind the figure, autumn-colored foliage in yellow and green tones and horizontal benches are reduced to unrecognizable color streaks by the extreme blur technique.
